issues_found.issue: IAPSku interface lacked glowstone field; all IAP packs are glowstone packs but the interface only had beach_coins, causing glowstone to never be granted to the client in either native or sandbox mode.
issues_found.fix_applied: Added glowstone field to IAPSku interface. Updated PurchaseResult to include glowstone field. Dual-currency comment on module updated.

issues_found.issue: _verifyWithBackend ignored glowstone_granted and updated_currency.glowstone from backend response. addCurrency was called with hardcoded 0 for glowstones, so verified IAP purchases never credited glowstone.
issues_found.fix_applied: Computed glowstoneDelta = data.updated_currency.glowstone - progress.currency.glowstones and passed it as the second arg to pm.addCurrency(coinDelta, glowstoneDelta).

issues_found.issue: Sandbox/WebGL purchase path called pm.addCurrency(sku.beach_coins, 0), always passing 0 for glowstones even for glowstone-only packs.
issues_found.fix_applied: Changed to pm.addCurrency(sku.beach_coins, sku.glowstone) so both currencies are granted in sandbox mode.

issues_found.issue: IAP_SKUS catalog used beach_coins values (60, 280, 880, 2500) for glowstone packs, mismatching the backend SKU_CONFIG which grants glowstone. Starter pack had beach_coins:300 but backend grants beach_coins:500 + glowstone:100.
issues_found.fix_applied: Added glowstone field to all SKUs. Set beach_coins=0 and glowstone=<correct amount> for pure glowstone packs (small/medium/large/mega). Set starter_pack beach_coins=500, glowstone=100 to match backend. Updated display logic to show '丹青石' for glowstone packs and combined amounts for mixed packs.

issues_found.issue: Popup showed only beach_coins amounts and success toast always said '枚沙滩币已到账', incorrect for glowstone purchases.
issues_found.fix_applied: Updated coinsAmountLabel display logic and success toast message to correctly show glowstone, beach_coins, or combined amounts based on what the SKU grants.

sandbox_test.backend_note: Backend IAP route correctly returns glowstone_granted and updated_currency with both beach_coins and glowstone. Route is registered under /v1 prefix in server.ts. Duplicate receipt detection and sandbox mode (NODE_ENV=development) both work correctly.
